attachment.

Here is the agenda for the meeting:

Regards,

content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 5

   - Does the projection of 132% RR reflect the expectation of how we will
   end the month?

We probably need to improve on our accuracy if so..



Slide 14

   - Which category is VN strong in for SIP?

Does it make sense to explore
   direct selling to other markets?

Slide 18

   - Does this issue impact SBS sellers?
- How does it impact TT in their business?

Slide 19

   - How do we use this chance to push sellers to use SBS?

Slide 20

   - @Yuna Kwon <yuna.kwon@shopee.com> is the impact here aligned with your
   thinking?

Feels lower than what you were saying



Slide 21

   - Seems like TT does not need the custom declaration?

Which means that
   they are more lax than us?

Slide 23

   - Typically even if they convert to “local”, it depends on whether the
   decision maker sits. For most KR sellers and certain CN sellers, decision
   maker still sits in home country, so account management will need to be in
   home market.



Slide 24

   - Even if we go with consignment model for CB sellers, it is still
   acceptable legally right?
Just need additional HC to support this?

- There is probably revenue implication given higher comms for CB
   sellers, so think we can probably argue that consignment is probably ok
   net-net



Others

   - @Ning Li <ning.li@shopee.com> any issue regarding Lovito that we would
   like to bring up?

Hi all,

Thank you for joining our VN CB Monthly Update - 15th Jan.

Please kindly find meeting follow up here:

No. Topic Action Items PIC ETA
1 CB 2025 Plan - Sync up with local BI team about 2025 budget and P&L plan
for CB as part of monthly budget review
- Local BI to own full CB target/budgeting projection to improve RR accuracy
Kenny/Lisa 10 Feb

2
VN 3PF 2025 Business Direction
- Aligned to convert the model asap following end-of-March timeline as the
hard cut-off
- Team to design checklist and start follow-up actions according to
sellers' preferences Eric 7 Feb
- Fin/Legal team to provide documents checklist for 3PF compliant payment
flow Ms. Giang/Eric 24 Jan
3 KRCB Official WH - Short term direction: sellers to go with 3PF model
(white-channel)
- Long term direction: sellers to convert to local FBS business if they
localise Eric/Yuna -
4 Lovito Affiliate - To deep dive Lovito Aff commission/CR, then help
source and connect the right fashion affiliates for Lovito Siqin/Bin 24 Jan
5 VNSIP Direct Selling - To review E2E seller requirements / direct selling
process and payment flow Hoa/Nicholas 7 Feb

For Ian's pre-read questions, please refer to our answers in the pdf
attached.

If you need further questions, please let me know.

Best regards,
Lisa

+ @Kylie Trinh - VN BI <phuong.trinh@shopee.com> @Ba Huy Nguyen
<bahuy.nguyen@shopee.com> VN BI

@Lisa <hongngoc.bui@shopee.com> topic PIC for #3 will be @Joanne Lee
<joanne.lee@shopee.com>. Thanks
